name: Progress
description: Linear progress bar with determinate + indeterminate modes.

api.name: Progress
api.description: Linear progress bar with determinate + indeterminate modes.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Current progress amount, clamped into 0..Max for both the rendered fill and the announced aria-valuenow.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: The value that represents 100% completion. Default: 100.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Color variant applied to the fill/stroke. Default: Default.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Renders as a linear bar (default) or a circular ring.

parameters.name: IsIndeterminate
parameters.description: Renders a busy sweep animation instead of a value-driven fill, for progress with an unknown duration. Sets aria-busy and omits aria-valuenow.

parameters.name: ShowLabel
parameters.description: Shows a percentage/Label text next to the bar or ring.

parameters.name: ShowValue
parameters.description: For the circular shape, renders the percentage/Label text centered inside the ring.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Custom text shown instead of the computed percentage when ShowLabel or ShowValue is set.

parameters.name: Striped
parameters.description: Overlays diagonal stripes on the linear fill.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: Animates the diagonal stripes sliding across the linear fill. Implies Striped.

parameters.name: Animation
parameters.description: Opt-in animation variant for the linear progress fill. None (default) leaves existing behaviour untouched. Stripe overlays translucent diagonal stripes that sweep across the bar.

parameters.name: GradientFrom
parameters.description: Start color of a linear gradient fill (CSS color string). Requires GradientTo to also be set; overrides Variant's solid color when both are present.

parameters.name: GradientTo
parameters.description: End color of a linear gradient fill (CSS color string). Requires GradientFrom to also be set.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Bar thickness / ring diameter preset: "Small", "Default", or "Large".

parameters.name: StrokeWidth
parameters.description: Stroke width in px for the circular shape's ring. Default: 4.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the progress element (bar or circular wrapper).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the progress element (bar or circular wrapper).

examples.title: Interactive
examples.code:
<Progress Value="@_value" />
<Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
    <Button OnClick="Decrease">-10</Button>
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">@_value%</Lumeo.Text>
    <Button OnClick="Increase">+10</Button>
</Flex>

@code {
    private int _value = 50;
    private void Increase() => _value = Math.Min(100, _value + 10);
    private void Decrease() => _value = Math.Max(0, _value - 10);
}

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Current progress amount, clamped into 0..Max for the rendered ring fill.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: The value that represents a complete (100%) ring. Default: 100.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Diameter of the ring in px. Default: 64.

parameters.name: StrokeWidth
parameters.description: Stroke width of the ring in px. Default: 4.

parameters.name: ShowValue
parameters.description: Renders the percentage (or Formatted value) centered inside the ring when ChildContent is not supplied. Default: true.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: A composite format string applied to Value (e.g. "{0:N1}") for the centered text. When null, the percentage (N%) is shown.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom content centered inside the ring, replacing the default value/percentage text.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root wrapper.

parameters.name: CurrentStep
parameters.description: 0-based index of the active step. Steps before it render as completed (with a checkmark); this and later steps render as current/upcoming.

parameters.name: Steps
parameters.description: The step labels, rendered in order.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Layout direction: "Horizontal" (default) lays steps in a row with connecting lines; "Vertical" stacks them in a column.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root wrapper.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Custom content centered inside the ring, replacing the default value/percentage text.

mdSummary:
# Progress

Linear progress bar with determinate + indeterminate modes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/progress

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Progress | Value | `int` | `0` | Current progress amount, clamped into 0..Max for both the rendered fill and the announced aria-valuenow. |
| Progress | Max | `int` | `100` | The value that represents 100% completion. Default: 100. |
| Progress | Variant | `ProgressVariant` | `ProgressVariant.Default` | Color variant applied to the fill/stroke. Default: Default. |
| Progress | Shape | `ProgressShape` | `ProgressShape.Linear` | Renders as a linear bar (default) or a circular ring. |
| Progress | IsIndeterminate | `bool` | `false` | Renders a busy sweep animation instead of a value-driven fill, for progress with an unknown duration. Sets aria-busy and omits aria-valuenow. |
| Progress | ShowLabel | `bool` | `false` | Shows a percentage/Label text next to the bar or ring. |
| Progress | ShowValue | `bool` | `false` | For the circular shape, renders the percentage/Label text centered inside the ring. |
| Progress | Label | `string?` | `` | Custom text shown instead of the computed percentage when ShowLabel or ShowValue is set. |
| Progress | Striped | `bool` | `false` | Overlays diagonal stripes on the linear fill. |
| Progress | Animated | `bool` | `false` | Animates the diagonal stripes sliding across the linear fill. Implies Striped. |
| Progress | Animation | `ProgressAnimation` | `ProgressAnimation.None` | Opt-in animation variant for the linear progress fill. None (default) leaves existing behaviour untouched. Stripe overlays translucent diagonal stripes that sweep across the bar. |
| Progress | GradientFrom | `string?` | `` | Start color of a linear gradient fill (CSS color string). Requires GradientTo to also be set; overrides Variant's solid color when both are present. |
| Progress | GradientTo | `string?` | `` | End color of a linear gradient fill (CSS color string). Requires GradientFrom to also be set. |
| Progress | Size | `string` | `"Default"` | Bar thickness / ring diameter preset: "Small", "Default", or "Large". |
| Progress | StrokeWidth | `int` | `4` | Stroke width in px for the circular shape's ring. Default: 4. |
| Progress | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the progress element (bar or circular wrapper). |
| Progress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the progress element (bar or circular wrapper). |
| CircularProgress | Value | `double` | `0` | Current progress amount, clamped into 0..Max for the rendered ring fill. |
| CircularProgress | Max | `double` | `100` | The value that represents a complete (100%) ring. Default: 100. |
| CircularProgress | Size | `int` | `64` | Diameter of the ring in px. Default: 64. |
| CircularProgress | StrokeWidth | `int` | `4` | Stroke width of the ring in px. Default: 4. |
| CircularProgress | ShowValue | `bool` | `true` | Renders the percentage (or Formatted value) centered inside the ring when ChildContent is not supplied. Default: true. |
| CircularProgress | Format | `string?` | `` | A composite format string applied to Value (e.g. "{0:N1}") for the centered text. When null, the percentage (N%) is shown. |
| CircularProgress | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom content centered inside the ring, replacing the default value/percentage text. |
| CircularProgress | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper. |
| CircularProgress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root wrapper. |
| StepsProgress | CurrentStep | `int` | `0` | 0-based index of the active step. Steps before it render as completed (with a checkmark); this and later steps render as current/upcoming. |
| StepsProgress | Steps | `List\<string\>?` | `` | The step labels, rendered in order. |
| StepsProgress | Orientation | `string` | `"Horizontal"` | Layout direction: "Horizontal" (default) lays steps in a row with connecting lines; "Vertical" stacks them in a column. |
| StepsProgress | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper. |
| StepsProgress | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root wrapper. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (CircularProgress) — Custom content centered inside the ring, replacing the default value/percentage text.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `CircularProgress`, `StepsProgress`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Progress />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Progress/CircularProgress.razor`
- `UI/Progress/Progress.razor`
- `UI/Progress/StepsProgress.razor`
